output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and demand your deposit back fast at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: Why Landlords Illegally Withhold Security Deposits
What Landlords Can and Cannot Deduct From Your Deposit
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Gets Results
When to Escalate to Small Claims Court
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days
Normal wear and tear cannot be legally deducted from your deposit
A certified demand letter is the fastest way to force compliance before court
Deposits-Back.com generates a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 with no signup or subscription

short_form_scripts.hook: My landlord refused to return my $2,000 deposit...
short_form_scripts.script: I cleaned everything. Took photos. But he ghosted me for 2 months. I thought I had to hire a lawyer. Turns out, all I needed was a demand letter. I used Deposits-Back.com. $19.99, 60 seconds, no signup. He paid me in a week. Link in bio.

short_form_scripts.hook: Your landlord cannot keep your deposit for normal wear and tear. Period.
short_form_scripts.script: Scuffed floors? Nope. Nail holes? Nope. If they're charging you for that, they're wrong. Most states give them 14 to 30 days max. After that? They're in trouble. Don't let them win. Send a legal demand letter at Deposits-Back.com for $19.99. No subscription, no signup.

short_form_scripts.hook: 3 things to do when your landlord doesn't return your deposit.
short_form_scripts.script: One: Document everything. Photos, texts, emails. Two: Check your state timeline. Most are 30 days or less. Three: Send a certified demand letter. Not an email. A real letter. Don't know what to write? Deposits-Back.com writes it for you in 60 seconds. $19.99 flat. Link below.
